title: How to Reserve a Spot for an Event
content:
If a user asks how to reserve an event:

- Guide them to the CultPass app
- Instruct them to browse the experience catalog and tap 'Reserve'
- If it's a premium or limited event, check if reservation confirmation is required via email
- Remind them to arrive at least 15 minutes early with their QR code visible

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can reserve an experience by opening the CultPass app, selecting your desired event, and tapping 'Reserve'. Be sure to arrive 15 minutes early with your QR code ready."

title: What's Included in a CultPass Subscription
content:
Each user is entitled to 4 cultural experiences per month, which may include:
- Art exhibitions
- Museum entries
- Music concerts
- Film screenings and more

Some premium experiences may require an additional fee (visible in the app).

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Your CultPass subscription includes 4 curated experiences each month. You can choose from museums, concerts, film events and more. Premium events may have an extra cost, which is shown during reservation."

title: How to Cancel or Pause a Subscription
content:
Users can manage their subscription via the app > 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'.

- Cancel: Effective at the end of the billing cycle
- Pause: Preserves user data, resumes automatically when reactivated
- Do NOT offer refunds unless approved by support lead

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can cancel or pause your subscription at any time via the 'My Account' section in the CultPass app. Cancelation takes effect at the end of your billing cycle."

title: How to Handle Login Issues?
content:
Most login issues are resolved with password reset:

- Ask the user to tap 'Forgot Password' on the login screen
- Ensure they are using the correct registered email
- If they did not receive the reset email, check spam folder or retry after 10 minutes
- For persistent login issues, escalate to human support

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Try tapping 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. Make sure you're using the email associated with your account. If the email doesn't arrive, check spam or try again in a few minutes."

title: How to Update Payment Method
content:
Users can update their payment method via the app:

- Go to 'My Account' > 'Payment Methods'
- Tap 'Add New Card' or 'Edit' on an existing card
- Enter new card details and confirm
- The new card will be used for the next billing cycle

If a payment fails, the system retries 3 times over 7 days before suspending the subscription.

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can update your payment method in 'My Account' > 'Payment Methods'. Add a new card or edit an existing one. Changes take effect on your next billing date."

title: How to Request a Refund
content:
Refund policy for CultPass:

- Refunds are only available for experiences cancelled by the organizer
- No-show events are NOT eligible for refund
- Subscription fees are non-refundable after the first 14 days
- For eligible refunds, process takes 5-10 business days

To request a refund:
1. Verify the experience was cancelled by organizer (check event status)
2. Confirm user attended within eligibility window
3. If eligible, submit refund request through admin panel
4. If NOT eligible, explain policy clearly and offer alternatives

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Refunds are available for experiences cancelled by the organizer. If your event was cancelled, the refund will be processed within 5-10 business days. Subscription fees are non-refundable after the 14-day trial period."

title: How to Handle Blocked Accounts
content:
If a user's account is blocked:

- Check the reason for blocking in the admin system
- Common reasons: payment fraud, terms of service violation, repeated no-shows
- Blocked users cannot make new reservations or access premium content

Resolution steps:
1. Verify user identity
2. Check block reason in the system
3. For payment issues: direct to payment update
4. For ToS violations: escalate to support lead
5. For no-shows: warn and unblock after 30 days

**Important:** Never unblock an account without manager approval for fraud cases.

**Suggested phrasing:**
"I can see your account has been temporarily restricted. Let me look into the reason and help you resolve this."

title: Premium vs Basic Tier Comparison
content:
CultPass offers two subscription tiers:

**Basic Tier:**
- 4 experiences per month
- Standard events only
- Email support
- 48-hour booking window

**Premium Tier:**
- 8 experiences per month
- Access to premium/VIP events
- Priority support (chat + phone)
- 72-hour advance booking window
- Guest pass (1 per month)
- Exclusive partner discounts

Upgrade path: Users can upgrade anytime via 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan' > 'Upgrade'.
Downgrade takes effect at end of billing cycle.

**Suggested phrasing:**
"With Premium, you get 8 experiences per month, access to VIP events, priority support, and a monthly guest pass. You can upgrade anytime in the app."
tags: subscription, tier, premium, basic, upgrade, comparison

title: How to Use Guest Pass
content:
Premium subscribers get 1 guest pass per month:

- Guest pass allows bringing one additional person to any experience
- Must be activated before the event (at least 24 hours prior)
- Guest does not need a CultPass account
- Guest pass does NOT carry over to next month

To use:
1. Open the reserved experience in the app
2. Tap 'Add Guest'
3. Enter guest's name and email
4. Both QR codes will be sent via email

**Suggested phrasing:**
"As a Premium member, you can bring a guest to any experience. Just tap 'Add Guest' on your reservation at least 24 hours before the event."
tags: guest pass, premium, events, companion, sharing

title: How to Report a Problem with an Experience
content:
If a user had a negative experience:

1. Listen empathetically and acknowledge the issue
2. Ask for specific details (date, event name, what happened)
3. Log the complaint in the ticket system
4. For safety issues: escalate immediately
5. For quality issues: offer alternative experience credit
6. For venue issues: forward to partner relations team

Compensation guidelines:
- Minor inconvenience: apologize, no credit
- Moderate issue (late start, overcrowded): 1 bonus experience credit
- Major issue (event cancelled on-site, safety concern): full refund + 2 credits

**Suggested phrasing:**
"I'm sorry to hear about your experience. Let me document this and see how we can make it right."
tags: complaint, problem, experience, quality, compensation, report

title: How to Transfer or Gift a Subscription
content:
CultPass subscriptions are non-transferable, but users can gift a new subscription:

- Gift subscriptions are available for 1, 3, 6, or 12 months
- Purchased via the app or website under 'Gift CultPass'
- Recipient receives an activation code via email
- Gift subscriptions do not auto-renew

If a user wants to transfer their existing subscription:
- This is NOT possible
- Suggest gifting a new one instead
- Account credentials should never be shared

**Suggested phrasing:**
"While subscriptions can't be transferred, you can gift a CultPass subscription to someone! Just go to 'Gift CultPass' in the app to choose a plan duration."

title: How to Check Reservation Status
content:
Users can check their reservations in the app:

- Go to 'My Reservations' from the main menu
- Active reservations show date, time, venue, and QR code
- Past reservations are archived under 'History'

Reservation statuses:
- **Reserved**: Confirmed, awaiting event date
- **Attended**: User checked in at venue
- **Cancelled**: User or organizer cancelled
- **No-show**: User did not attend
- **Waitlisted**: Event full, user on waiting list

For waitlisted events, users are notified if a spot opens up.

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can view all your reservations in 'My Reservations'. Each one shows the event details and your QR code for check-in."

title: App Technical Issues and Troubleshooting
content:
Common technical issues and solutions:

**App crashes:**
- Ensure app is updated to latest version
- Clear app cache (Settings > Apps > CultPass > Clear Cache)
- Restart device
- If persists, reinstall the app

**QR code not loading:**
- Check internet connection
- Force close and reopen app
- Screenshot QR code in advance as backup

**Notifications not working:**
- Check notification permissions in phone settings
- Ensure 'Do Not Disturb' is off
- Verify notification preferences in app settings

**Slow performance:**
- Free up device storage
- Close background apps
- Update to latest app version

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Let's try a few troubleshooting steps. First, make sure your app is updated to the latest version. If the issue persists, try clearing the app cache."
tags: technical, app, crash, bug, troubleshooting, performance

title: How to Contact Support Channels
content:
CultPass offers multiple support channels:

**Chat Support (This channel):**
- Available 24/7 for all users
- AI-assisted with human escalation
- Best for: general questions, booking help, account issues

**Email Support:**
- support@cultpass.com
- Response within 24 hours
- Best for: detailed complaints, documentation requests

**Phone Support (Premium only):**
- +1-800-CULTPASS
- Available Mon-Fri 9AM-6PM
- Best for: urgent issues, complex account problems

**Social Media:**
- @CultPassHelp on Twitter/X
- Response within 4 hours during business hours

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can reach us here in chat anytime, or email support@cultpass.com for detailed requests. Premium members also have access to phone support."

title: Data Privacy and Account Deletion
content:
CultPass data privacy policy for support agents:

**Data access:**
- Users can request a copy of their data via 'My Account' > 'Privacy'
- Data export includes: profile, reservations, payment history
- Export delivered within 30 days

**Account deletion:**
- Users can request account deletion
- Process takes 30 days (grace period for reconsideration)
- All personal data is permanently erased
- Active subscriptions must be cancelled first
- Reservation history is anonymized, not deleted

**Important notes:**
- Never share user data with third parties without consent
- Verify user identity before making any account changes
- Log all data requests in the ticket system

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can request your data or account deletion through 'My Account' > 'Privacy'. Data exports take up to 30 days, and deletion has a 30-day grace period."
tags: privacy, data, deletion, GDPR, account, security
